☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Blitzo’s head felt like it was being fucking beaten in an annoyingly constant rhythm. It made his memories blur together and it took him a couple seconds to realize he was even awake. A soft groan slips out before he can stop it, and he can feel his own sickenly warm blood dripping down his forehead. Ragged breaths filled the agonizing silence of the room as, slowly but surely, Blitzo managed to remember what the fuck had happened. And oh heaven was he in deep shit.

For now though he was tied down to a metal chair bolted into the ground. He was wrapped in chains and his tail was forcefully trapped around one of the chair legs. Seemed the human keeping him here wasn’t dumb enough to just keep him in rope — which he would easily be able to break. Fuck, that meant he was trapped. Not good. ❞
